title: Pencil Design System by Brainly – UI Tools & Components
content: # Brainly Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Biweekly Digest Created by Adobe Alaska Airlines Amazon Apple Atlassian Audi Basis Biings Carrefour Cash App CBRE Build Cisco Datadog Dell Docplanner eBay Elastic Esri General Electric Github GitLab Google GOV.UK Gusto Helly Hansen IBM Ideagen INPS Kajabi Kiwicom Lemon Squeezy Line LocalTapiola Michelin Microsoft Monday.com MongoDB Motorway Mozilla Nordhealth Ontario Orange Palantir Pinterest Pluralsight Porsche Razorpay Red Hat Rei Salesforce Samsung Seek Segment ServiceNow Shopify Skoda Sprout Social SumUp Sunrise Teamleader Thumbtack Twilio U.S. Web UAE Uber Vercel Visa Washington Post Wikimedia Wise Wonderflow Workday WorkOS Zendesk Keep up with the latest in Design Systems Subscribe Pencil from Directories: Components: Pencil Design System crafted to enhance user experiences on Brainly's platform. System offers a diverse array of design principles, guidelines, and reusable components. Design System provides a centralized hub for design assets and documentation, fostering collaboration and consistency across projects. Pencil serves as the foundation of Brainly's mission to empower learners worldwide, fostering a community-driven approach to education and knowledge sharing.
